_readme: Maps vendor NPCs to the item Types they buy, so item pages can show a 'Sold to' list. List each vendor once. 'buys' values must match the Type shown on an item page (e.g. Weapon, Armor, Tradeskill Ingredient, Inventory Items, 1H Slashing). 'zone' = where the NPC is. 'shady': true for a shady vendor. Edit this file (even on github.com from your phone) as you discover vendors in-game.
